mapper.select: SELECT id, interface_id, adapter_type, url, http_method, timeout_ms, auth_type, auth_value, request_headers, datasource_id, statement_id, operation_type, remote_host, remote_port, remote_user, remote_password, remote_path, done_path, file_pattern, file_encoding, extra_config, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM eai_adapter_config WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eai_adapter_config (interface_id, adapter_type, url, http_method, timeout_ms, auth_type, auth_value, request_headers, datasource_id, statement_id, operation_type, remote_host, remote_port, remote_user, remote_password, remote_path, done_path, file_pattern, file_encoding, extra_config, is_active) VALUES (#{interfaceId}, #{adapterType}, #{url}, #{httpMethod}, #{timeoutMs}, #{authType}, #{authValue}, #{requestHeaders}, #{datasourceId}, #{statementId}, #{operationType}, #{remoteHost}, #{remotePort}, #{remoteUser}, #{remotePassword}, #{remotePath}, #{donePath}, #{filePattern}, #{fileEncoding}, #{extraConfig}, #{isActive})
mapper.update:
UPDATE eai_adapter_config
interface_id = #{interfaceId}, adapter_type = #{adapterType}, url = #{url}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, timeout_ms = #{timeoutMs}, auth_type = #{authType},
auth_value = #{authValue},
request_headers = #{requestHeaders}, datasource_id = #{datasourceId}, statement_id = #{statementId}, operation_type = #{operationType}, remote_host = #{remoteHost}, remote_port = #{remotePort}, remote_user = #{remoteUser},
remote_password = #{remotePassword},
remote_path = #{remotePath}, done_path = #{donePath}, file_pattern = #{filePattern}, file_encoding = #{fileEncoding}, extra_config = #{extraConfig}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
